title: New Federal Grant Program Launches to Support Green Energy Degree Seekers
summary: The 2026 Student Loan Relief Act has officially expanded eligibility for public service forgiveness, specifically targeting recent graduates entering green energy careers. This federal initiative aims to incentivize young professionals to tackle climate change while reducing the debt burden on Gen Z workers.

title: Georgia State Senate Debates Bill for Solar Energy on University Campuses
summary: Georgia lawmakers are debating HB 402, which would mandate solar panel installations on all new public university buildings across the University System of Georgia. The bill aims to reach carbon neutrality for state campuses by 2040 and includes funding for student-led environmental research projects.

title: MARTA Proposes Free Transit Pass Program for Fulton County College Students
summary: MARTA has proposed a new 'Student Mobility' pilot program for the Fall 2026 semester that would provide unlimited transit passes to all full-time college students in Fulton County. The initiative seeks to decrease traffic congestion around midtown Atlanta and lower the carbon footprint of daily commutes.

title: New Affordable Housing Bill Proposed
summary: A new bill aims to increase affordable housing units by 30% in your district. Here's what it means for renters and homeowners.

title: State Education Budget Under Review
summary: The governor's proposed budget includes significant changes to public university funding that could affect tuition rates.

title: Student Loan Reform Update
summary: New federal proposals could change income-driven repayment plans. Here's a breakdown of what's on the table.

title: Local Transit Expansion Vote Coming Up
summary: Your city is voting on a major public transit expansion. This could reduce commute times and affect property values.

title: Climate Action Bill Advances
summary: A landmark climate bill has passed committee. It includes clean energy targets and new environmental regulations.

title: Healthcare Expansion Debate Heats Up
summary: State legislators are debating expanding Medicaid eligibility. The proposal could cover an additional 400,000 residents.

title: Minimum Wage Increase Proposed
summary: A new proposal would raise the local minimum wage to $18/hour by 2028, affecting thousands of workers in the service industry.

title: Immigration Reform Package Introduced
summary: A bipartisan group of senators has introduced a comprehensive immigration reform package addressing visa backlogs and border security.
